name: StatsPAI
desc: StatsPAI is the first Agent-native Python library for causal inference and applied econometrics — unified API, broad cross-method coverage, structured result o…
descFull: StatsPAI is the first Agent-native Python library for causal inference and applied econometrics — unified API, broad cross-method coverage, structured result objects, machine-readable schemas, Skills, an MCP server, and R/Stata parity validation.
